name: Stash
description: Hoard everything, find anything — your private on-device AI inbox
compose:
name: slashnode-stash
services:
  web:
    image: savewithstash/stash:1.0.1
    container_name: stash
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PORT: '5173'
    volumes:
      - web_data-app:/app/data
      - web_data-models:/app/models
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5173:5173
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-app:
    name: slashnode-stash_web_data-app
  web_data-models:
    name: slashnode-stash_web_data-models
